ddls:
CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, refund) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items purchased */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the transaction */,
  "is_return" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the transaction is a return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of customers in the segment */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of customers in the segment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of customers in the segment */,
  "segment_criteria" TEXT /* Detailed criteria for segment membership */,
  "segment_size" INTEGER /* Number of customers in the segment */,
  "segment_status" TEXT /* Status of the segment (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)
